chatgpt.text:
ChatGPT:思考時間: 6sGPT司会 最終案
consensus_candidate: true
Geminiから「重大異論なし。Shujiさん確認へ出せる状態」と明示されたため、Orchestrator上の合意候補として R50最終インフラ案はShujiさん確認へ提出可能 と判定します。
これはShujiさん承認の代弁ではありません。あくまで GPT↔Gemini自動relayによるOrchestrator判定 です。

修正反映後の最終案
Tier 1：深掘り・採用候補
DEX/perp主候補:- HyperliquidDEX/perp副軸:- dYdX v4CFD/MT5検証枠:- Exness国内出入口・税務・保管:- GMOコイン- bitbank- bitFlyer- SBI VCトレード
Tier 2：補助・保留
- Lighter- FXGT- EdgeX- Jupiter Perps- Vertex- Drift- GMX- Phemex- KuCoin- Crypto.com Exchange- Coincheck- BitTrade- OKCoinJapan
Tier 3：却下・原則非推奨
- Bybit- BitMEX- Binance Global Futures- OKX Global- Gate.io- BingX- MEXC- Bitget- P2P常用- Wise既定路線
除外・廃止済み確認枠
- DMM Bitcoin  理由: 事業終了・SBI VCトレード移管済み扱いとして、通常のTier評価から外す

経路
経路A：CFD検証ルート
日本円/銀行/カード等→ Exness→ MT5 / BTC CFD検証
用途はMT5疎通・小額検証。perp本命ではありません。
経路B：AI育成本命ルート
国内取引所→ XRP / USDC対応チェーン / SOL→ Hyperliquid / dYdX v4
danjer DNA / ロンポチ DNA の本命検証はこちら。
海外CEX規制リスクを避ける意味でも、経路Bの重要性を高く見ます。

unresolved_critical_issues
なし。
ただし、Shujiさん確認前の注意点は残します。
- Hyperliquidは主候補だが既定路線ではない- Wise既定路線は却下- ExnessはCFD/MT5検証枠でありperp本命ではない- 海外CEXは日本居住者向けIP制限・規約変更・突発的規制強化リスクあり- Shujiさん承認はまだ未取得

Shujiさん確認へ出せるか
出せます。
Orchestrator判定としては、
consensus_candidate = trueunresolved_critical_issues = []final_report_ready = true
です。
次は、Claudeがこの結果を議事録・state.jsonへ反映し、Shujiさんへ「確認依頼」として提示してください。正式終結はShujiさんの確認後です。
[GPT-Verify: R50-MULTIROUND-R1-CONSENSUS-RESULT]
[NextActor: Claude]
[EndTime-JST: 15:48:47]

r50_iphone_dashboard_access_consensus.topic: iPhone別端末からダッシュボードUI閲覧+書き込み (read+write 双方向)
r50_iphone_dashboard_access_consensus.next_action: Shuji Tailscale install (Mac + iPhone) -> tailscale ip -4 -> implementation
r50_iphone_dashboard_access_consensus.macos_compat_confirmed: macOS 12 Monterey is supported by Tailscale (official requirement: macOS 12+)
r50_iphone_dashboard_access_consensus.implementation_by: clerk_claude (γ option, R50 spec mechanical apply)
r50_iphone_dashboard_access_consensus.ios_pwa_https_required_finding: PWA requires HTTPS (secure context, web standard). R50 'HTTPS不要' judgment was incomplete audit.
r50_iphone_dashboard_access_consensus.https_resolution: Tailscale Serve (Funnel disabled to preserve R50 external-no-publish principle)

r52_iphone_https_access_failure_consensu.topic: iPhone Safari HTTPS access failure (post R50 implementation)
r52_iphone_https_access_failure_consensu.root_cause: sudo tailscale serve writes config to root namespace; user-context Tailscale daemon cannot read it; HTTPS port 443 doesn't need root because Tailscale virtual NIC bypasses macOS pfctl privileged-port check
recovery_steps_4lines: sudo tailscale serve reset 2>/dev/null; tailscale serve reset 2>/dev/null
r52_iphone_https_access_failure_consensu.mac_reboot_persistence: Tailscale app auto-launch + serve.conf in user permission area = auto-restored; for extra safety use ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.kitt.tailscale-serve.plist

r53_tailscale_serve_phantom_start_consen.topic: Tailscale Serve Phantom Start (CLI success display + backend No serve config)
r53_tailscale_serve_phantom_start_consen.root_cause: macOS 12.7.6 (Tier 3 unsupported by Apple) + Tailscale 1.98.x serve depends on macOS 13+ Network.framework. Daemon internal serve config parse or virtual NIC bind silently crashes. CLI accepts -> daemon immediately discards = Phantom Start
r53_tailscale_serve_phantom_start_consen.adopted_solution: Uvicorn HTTPS termination + openssl self-signed cert + Tailscale IP direct bind
r53_tailscale_serve_phantom_start_consen.iphone_safari_flow: https://100.70.20.113:8765/ -> self-signed warning -> tap '閲覧を続ける' (one-time) -> Basic auth (shuji/test1234) -> dashboard
r53_tailscale_serve_phantom_start_consen.persistence_phase2: AirDrop cert.pem to iPhone -> 'プロファイル' install -> '証明書信頼設定' enable (survives PWA install)

r54_ios26_selfsigned_rejection_consensus.topic: iOS 26.5.1 Safari rejects self-signed cert with '続ける' tap (new spec)
r54_ios26_selfsigned_rejection_consensus.root_cause: iOS 26.x changed Safari behavior: self-signed cert with '続ける' tap = forced rejection (iOS 25 and earlier allowed continue). Apple requires root CA install with 設定→一般→情報→証明書信頼設定 full trust ON
r54_ios26_selfsigned_rejection_consensus.r53_judgment_corrected: R53 'mkcert not adopted' judgment was based on iOS 25 behavior, broken by iOS 26 spec change
r54_ios26_selfsigned_rejection_consensus.adopted_solution: mkcert + iPhone root CA install + 3-stage activation flow
recovery_steps_macos: Ctrl+C to stop uvicorn, restart with same uvicorn command (new certs)
recovery_steps_iphone: Stage 1 (profile install ~5 taps): AirDrop accept -> Settings 'profile downloaded' tap -> install -> passcode -> 'unsigned profile' warning still install -> done
Stage 3 (full trust): Settings -> General -> About -> Certificate Trust Settings -> mkcert root toggle ON
r54_ios26_selfsigned_rejection_consensus.iphone_safari_result: https://100.70.20.113:8765/ -> no warning -> Basic auth -> dashboard
r54_ios26_selfsigned_rejection_consensus.verification_full_chain: R50 design -> R51 (not raised) -> R52 sudo correction -> R53 Tailscale Serve giveup -> R54 mkcert + iPhone root CA install -> iPhone PWA full-screen working
